skills.name: architecture-diagram
skills.description: Generate self-contained HTML architecture diagrams (inline SVG, dark theme, no JS) for blogs/READMEs. Triggers on system architecture, microservices, cloud/AWS/GCP, K8s, network topology, data flow diagrams. Use `drawio` instead when the output needs to be editable.
skills.author: Cocoon AI (adapted by Maki)

skills.name: case-study
skills.description: 專案案例包裝。把真實專案包裝成面試/LinkedIn 用的結構化案例（問題→方案→架構→Tech Stack→成果→展示重點）。當用戶說「包裝案例」「寫 case study」「面試用的案例」時使用。
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: csv-to-chart
skills.description: 把 CSV/TSV 資料自動生成圖表（line/bar/pie/scatter）。當用戶說「畫圖表」「csv 圖表」「chart」「visualize data」時使用。
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: cv-optimize
skills.description: Resume/CV optimization. Analyze a resume, reposition strengths, and produce an optimized PDF tailored to a target role.
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: db-eda
skills.description: 用自然語言查詢 SQLite 或 DuckDB 資料庫。當用戶說「查資料庫」「SQL 查詢」「db eda」「自然語言查 DB」時使用。
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: demo-storytelling
skills.description: 把 PoC / prototype 包裝成有說服力的 demo 故事。輸入技術成果/受眾/數據，輸出 demo 腳本 + 一頁摘要 + FAQ。當用戶要展示成果、準備 demo、報告 PoC 時使用。
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: disk-cleanup
skills.description: macOS 磁碟清理。掃描大目錄、分類可刪/可搬/需確認、Docker/Xcode 清理。當用戶說「清磁碟」「磁碟空間不夠」「disk cleanup」時使用。
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: drawio
skills.description: Generate draw.io diagrams (.drawio files) with optional PNG/SVG/PDF export. Triggers on diagram/flowchart/ER/sequence/class/network/architecture/wireframe/mockup/UI sketch requests.
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: generate-image
skills.description: 使用 Gemini Nano Banana 2 產生圖片。當用戶說「產圖」「生成圖片」「generate image」「畫一張圖」時使用。
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: gh-issue-to-spec
skills.description: 把 GitHub Issue 轉成結構化技術規格文件。當用戶說「issue 轉 spec」「寫規格」「gh issue to spec」時使用。
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: pdf-to-summary
skills.description: 讀取 PDF 檔案，產出結構化摘要。當用戶說「摘要 PDF」「summarize PDF」「PDF 重點」「讀這份 PDF」時使用。
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: postmortem
skills.description: 事故記錄。收集資訊、分析 root cause、記錄修復步驟、防止再發。當服務出事故後使用。
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: product-positioning
skills.description: 定位產品/功能的市場位置和溝通策略。輸入產品描述/目標用戶/競品，輸出 positioning statement + one-liner + elevator pitch + landing page 骨架。當用戶要介紹產品、寫 README、準備 pitch 時使用。
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: proposal-review
skills.description: 提案簡報結構審查。分析分頁邏輯、標題長度、內容分配，給出合併/拆分/精簡建議。當用戶說「review 這份提案」「簡報結構對不對」「幫我看一下分頁」時使用。
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: roundtable
skills.description: Virtual expert roundtable. Multiple thinkers analyze a document with different frameworks, then synthesize consensus/disagreements/blind spots.
skills.author: Maki

skills.name: vendor-eval
skills.description: Vendor proposal evaluation. Analyze technical architecture, pricing, and market benchmarks from a proposal PDF/Doc. Output evaluation report + comparison.
skills.author: Maki
